entries.title: confidence provenance: every number states its basis
entries.summary: - **Confidence provenance registry** (`retrieval/provenance.py`). Every confidence constant the suite emits now traces to a stated basis: `measured` — backed by a committed, reproducible benchmark artifact (`benchmarks/provenance/measured.json`: the tiktoken token-reduction

entries.title: source-shaped exact seeding in ranked context
entries.summary: - **`get_ranked_context` recognizes source-shaped query tokens and pins their exact symbol matches first.** A query that pastes an identifier straight out of the source — `Store.get`, `FreshnessProbe`, `get_ranked_context()` — names the one symbol the caller actually wants, but BM25 tokenization splits it

entries.title: the savings meter records a per-day rollup
entries.summary: The lifetime meter (`_savings.json`, written on every tool call) is the authoritative record of what each call actually avoided, but it stored only one number — so any windowed view ("today", "this month") had to fall back to scanning local transcripts, which miss cleared history and model savings with
